headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Yum! Brands (YUM) After Recent Share Price Moves?
summary: Wondering if Yum! Brands at around US$155 per share still offers value, or if most of the upside is already priced in. Over the short term the stock is up 3.5% in the last week, down 3.2% over the last month, and has returned 3.1% year to date and 8.7% over the past year. Recent headlines have focused on Yum! Brands as a global franchisor of quick service restaurants and its positioning among large US consumer services stocks. This context has kept investor attention on how resilient its...
